maps.title: Map 1 — Brand new (~0 views)
maps.hint: Sort by Upload Date (mandatory). Prefer non-biased searcher.

maps.title: Map 2 — Old & forgotten (~0 views)
maps.hint: Sort by View Count optional. Optional Before:YEAR filter.

maps.title: Map 3 — Low-view 2006–2008
maps.hint: Before:2008 / early years. Sort by View Count optional.

meta.attribution: Keyphrases compiled by KVN AUST and community contributors. This UI is an independent helper; not affiliated with YouTube or the doc author.
meta.paddingRule: Numeric fields pad with leading zeros to the width of the X placeholder (XXXX → 4 digits: 57 → 0057).
meta.dateRule: Date placeholders fill real calendar dates: YYYYMMDD, YYYY MM DD, YYYY-MM-DD, DDMMYYYY, DDMMYY (e.g. VDDMMYY), MM DD YYYY, YYYY MM, Month DD, YYYY, Month YYYY, bare YYYY, KO/JA forms. Year floors from (>YYYY) notes when present.
